content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed the diff: 3 changes in src/cli/project.rs and new tests in tests/cli.rs. (1) prompt_override skips br-list/dependency hydration — correct optimization, avoids unnecessary external calls. (2) markdown_heading_title expanded from h2-h6 to h1-h6 with proper CommonMark whitespace guard and ATX closing sequence handling — fixes planned-elsewhere summaries leaking level-1 headings as content. (3) build_planned_elsewhere_context now excludes downstream dependents from shared-acceptance-ownership to avoid duplicate entries with conflicting relationship labels. All 748 tests pass, no new clippy warnings. Changes are well-scoped, correct, and properly tested.

## Amendments

None.
